description_long: This is a tall, slender glass bottle with a dark, nearly opaque body and a deep red cap. The bottle features a large, rectangular label on its front, with visible text and a light background, suggesting it may be a wine or liquor bottle. The neck is long and tapers slightly toward the top, capped with a cylindrical closure. The glass appears thick and glossy, reflecting light subtly. The label is positioned centrally and wraps partially around the bottle, with some decorative elements visible. There are no visible signs of damage or wear, and the bottle's overall appearance is clean and well-maintained.
description: A tall, dark glass bottle with a red cap and a prominent front label, likely for wine or liquor. The surface is glossy and the label is light-colored with visible text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with text and decorative elements, and the red cap clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view with no visible label, showing the dark, glossy glass surface and the red cap.
description_view_2: Angled side view revealing the edge of the label and the bottle's cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Close-up of the label, with text and design details most visible, and the red cap on top.
attribute_label_or_branding: A large, rectangular, light-colored label with visible text and some decorative elements, centrally placed on the front of the bottle.
